nodes.label: Pair of 5s: never split — treat as hard 10 and double.
nodes.norm_label: pair of 5s: never split — treat as hard 10 and double.

nodes.label: 12 vs 4: stand (dealer's bust card, don't risk busting).
nodes.norm_label: 12 vs 4: stand (dealer's bust card, don't risk busting).

nodes.label: 12 vs 2: hit (dealer is less likely to bust).
nodes.norm_label: 12 vs 2: hit (dealer is less likely to bust).

nodes.norm_label: i18 #1: hard 16 vs 10 → stand at tc >= 0 (basic says hit).

nodes.label: Hard 16 vs 10 at TC=-1: basic strategy HIT applies.
nodes.norm_label: hard 16 vs 10 at tc=-1: basic strategy hit applies.

nodes.label: I18: Hard 12 vs 4 → HIT at TC < 0 (basic says STAND).
nodes.norm_label: i18: hard 12 vs 4 → hit at tc < 0 (basic says stand).

nodes.label: Hard 12 vs 4 at TC=1: basic strategy STAND applies.
nodes.norm_label: hard 12 vs 4 at tc=1: basic strategy stand applies.

nodes.label: I18: Hard 11 vs Ace → DOUBLE at TC >= 1 (basic says HIT vs A in S17).
nodes.norm_label: i18: hard 11 vs ace → double at tc >= 1 (basic says hit vs a in s17).

nodes.label: Fab 4: Hard 15 vs 10 → SURRENDER at TC >= 0.
nodes.norm_label: fab 4: hard 15 vs 10 → surrender at tc >= 0.

nodes.label: Hard 17 vs 7: always stand — no deviation should fire.
nodes.norm_label: hard 17 vs 7: always stand — no deviation should fire.
